outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Push for US-Iran talks gains momentum as White House expresses optimism for deal
outlets.summary: CNN covers diplomatic momentum with Pakistan reporting 'major breakthrough' on Iran nuclear, Trump announcing historic Netanyahu-Aoun call. S&P 500 record 7,033. Ceasefire expires April 22.

outlets.name: The Intercept
outlets.headline: The Dam Breaks: Democratic Senators Overwhelmingly Reject Arms Sales to Israel
outlets.summary: The Intercept leads with record 40 Democratic senators voting to block Israel arms sales. Highlights growing Democratic opposition to war. Hegseth impeachment articles filed with 12 cosponsors.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iranian general warns of Red Sea shipping lane shutdown amid US blockade
outlets.summary: Fox News covers IRGC Abdollahi's threat to block all Gulf/Oman/Red Sea shipping. Frames Iran as escalating despite ceasefire. Notes Trump's 'very close to over' optimism. Treasury 'Economic Fury' sanctions.

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: Iranian American Democrat files articles of impeachment against Pete Hegseth
outlets.summary: Washington Times covers Rep. Ansari's 5 articles of impeachment against Hegseth with 12 cosponsors. Pentagon dismisses as 'another Democrat trying to make headlines.' Focuses on political angle.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Pakistan in push for new round of US-Iran peace negotiations
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers Pakistan Army Chief Munir's arrival in Tehran carrying US message. Reports Iran's Red Sea/Gulf/Oman shipping threat. Ceasefire extension talks. Lebanese anger over continued Israeli strikes.

outlets.name: Reuters/AP
outlets.headline: Mediators move closer to extending US-Iran ceasefire
outlets.summary: AP/Reuters report on ceasefire extension progress. WH denies formally requesting extension but feels 'good about prospects.' Ceasefire expires April 21-22. Three sticking points remain.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Record Number of Democratic Senators Vote to Block Israel Arms Sales
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers record 40 Democratic senators voting to block Israel arms sales. Also reports Lebanese officials say ceasefire expected 'soon.' IDF soldier killed at Bint Jbeil. Security cabinet ended without Lebanon ceasefire decision.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF soldier killed in south Lebanon clashes; 98th Division nears Bint Jbeil capture
outlets.summary: JPost covers Sgt. Maj. Bianco killed at Bint Jbeil, 13 wounded. 98th Division nearing full control — 100+ Hezbollah killed. 3 Radwan fighters captured. Hezbollah fires 30 rockets at Nahariya.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran warns about 'dangerous consequences' of US actions targeting Persian Gulf, Hormuz Strait
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Abdollahi's threat to block all Gulf/Oman/Red Sea shipping. Wang Yi-Araghchi call — China backs Iran sovereignty. Pakistan Army Chief Munir in Tehran for mediation. Frames US blockade as illegal ceasefire violation.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Pakistan's army chief lands in Iran for mediation
outlets.summary: Iran International covers Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir arriving in Tehran carrying 'new message from US.' Reports on ceasefire extension negotiations. NPC suspends petrochemical exports. Iran's economic isolation deepening.
